_comment: Curated full-body person models for the 'person' category. These are SEGMENTATION models: the engine masks each person's exact body silhouette (MaskAnyone-style), not a bounding box. ONNX exports mirrored on Hugging Face; downloads are SHA-256 verified against the pinned hashes below (computed from the exact files validated during development). NOTE the AGPL-3.0 license on the YOLO-seg family: models are downloaded on demand and NEVER bundled with OpenScrub (same policy as the non-commercial SCRFD face model) - the license badge is shown in the model picker so users can make their own call.

models.label: YOLO11n-seg (silhouette masks - recommended)
models.attribution: Ultralytics YOLO11 segmentation (AGPL-3.0), standard ONNX export mirrored by mantaur on Hugging Face.
models.notes: 11 MB. Segments each person's exact body outline - only the silhouette is redacted, the background around them stays sharp. COCO-trained; OpenScrub keeps only the person class.

models.label: YOLOv8n-seg (silhouette masks - alternative)
models.attribution: Ultralytics YOLOv8 segmentation (AGPL-3.0), ONNX export published by mobilint on Hugging Face.
models.notes: 14 MB. Same silhouette masking with the previous-generation architecture; use if YOLO11 gives odd results on your footage.
